questions.text: Which of these is a Kharif crop?
questions.explanation: Rice is a Kharif crop (sown in rainy season). Wheat, gram, mustard are Rabi crops (sown in winter).

questions.text: Irrigation is the supply of water to crops at regular intervals.
questions.explanation: Irrigation is the artificial supply of water to crops at regular intervals for proper growth.

questions.correctAnswer: The process of separating grains from harvested crop.
questions.explanation: Threshing separates grains from the chaff after harvesting. It can be done manually or by machines.

questions.text: The process of loosening and turning soil is called ________.
questions.explanation: Ploughing/tilling is the process of loosening and turning soil to prepare it for sowing seeds.
